blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,936 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
